consensus.finding: Teardown sends SIGTERM only (no SIGKILL fallback, no wait loop) to PIDs in pids/*.pid
5s fixed sleep before PID capture is a race window; find_leaf_pid() first-child-only walk can record wrong PID on slow startup
Sub-agents spawned by commanders inside metaswarm are NOT tracked in pids/; teardown cannot reach them — process leak risk
stampede-monitor.sh has no SIGTERM/SIGINT trap and can hang forever when TOTAL_TASKS=1 (forced) but done_count stays 0
do_teardown() does NOT clean queue/, claimed/, results/, logs/, scripts/, collab/, or commanders/ directories
stampede.sh main body has no SIGINT/SIGTERM trap; launcher killed mid-run leaves no cleanup
--teardown flag is completely untested in smoke-test.sh; stop/teardown coverage ~15%
CI (ci.yml) does not run smoke-test.sh at all; no real stop/teardown validated in CI

top_gaps: No SIGKILL fallback in teardown PID termination
Commander sub-agent processes escape teardown — process leak in metaswarm stop
Monitor can hang forever (done_count=0 edge case)
No trap in stampede.sh launcher body
Teardown leaves claimed tasks abandoned (not requeued) and all run directories on disk
--teardown untested in smoke suite; CI never runs smoke-test.sh
